visual_description: A man in a dark suit and red tie walks into a dimly lit room, approaching a wire mesh cage on a table. He stops in front of the cage, looks down at it, and then turns his head to look off-screen to his right. The room is dark with a single hanging light fixture providing illumination.
audio_description: A pop song with a male vocalist is playing in the background.
